headline: SPRM investigated 12 state excos but AG declined all prosecutions
context: MACC completed investigations into 12 state executive councillors for corruption between 2023-2025, but the Attorney General declined prosecution in every case.

cards.big: 12 state excos investigated for corruption — AG declined to prosecute all 12
cards.sub: Every single state politician investigation ended the same way: no charges

cards.big: AG's discretion under Article 145 is absolute and not subject to judicial review
cards.sub: Prosecution decisions for politicians are unreviewable and reasons need not be given

cards.big: 12 investigations cost estimated RM8.4 million in MACC resources over 3 years
cards.sub: Anti-corruption budget spent on investigations that produce zero accountability outcomes

cards.big: AG declined all 12 within average of 34 days of receiving investigation papers
cards.sub: Speed of decisions suggests minimal review of what were multi-year investigations

cards.big: When every investigation of a politician ends in NFA, the message is that politics provides immunity
Should an independent prosecutor handle all cases involving elected officials?
